calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: Onboarding smoke test -- EWIN-PC (Eoin) [retry b]
items.notes: Re-run after GPU block hardening. Original V3-ONBOARD-smoke-EWIN-PC errored 2026-04-05 (exit code 1, 94.3s, no output file). Script now wraps Block 3 GPU in try/except (graceful fallback to CPU-only) and writes diagnostic error JSON on any crash.

items.title: MECH-187: Bidirectional z_goal Seeding Gain (5-cond: x0.6/x0.2 suppression, x2.0/x5.0 elevation)
items.note: MECH-187 bidirectional prediction. Gain multipliers: x0.6/x0.2 suppression (SIMPLE), x2.0/x5.0 elevation (LONG_HORIZON). Empirical anchors from Korte et al. 2016 (5-HT1B NAc microdialysis). Run after V3-EXQ-249.
